controls.name: Logical Access Controls
controls.sentinel_coverage: Role-based policy enforcement restricts AI tool access by department
controls.evidence: Policy engine logs all access decisions with role context

controls.name: Access Removal
controls.sentinel_coverage: Shadow AI detection flags unauthorized tool usage for removal
controls.evidence: Shadow AI detection logs with timestamps and employee IDs

controls.name: System Monitoring
controls.sentinel_coverage: All employee AI prompts analyzed and logged in real-time
controls.evidence: Full prompt audit trail with detection results and actions taken

controls.name: Anomaly Detection
controls.sentinel_coverage: 3-tier detection engine identifies security anomalies in AI usage
controls.evidence: Detection engine results with severity classifications

controls.name: Data Minimization
controls.sentinel_coverage: Auto-redaction removes personal data before it reaches AI tools
controls.evidence: Redaction logs showing original vs. sanitized prompts

controls.name: Right to Erasure
controls.sentinel_coverage: Prompt data retention controls with configurable deletion periods
controls.evidence: Data retention policy settings and deletion logs

controls.name: Security of Processing
controls.sentinel_coverage: PII detection prevents personal data from leaving the organization via AI tools
controls.evidence: PII detection results and blocking actions

controls.name: Consumer Data Protection
controls.sentinel_coverage: Customer PII detection and blocking before AI tool submission
controls.evidence: Consumer data detection logs with action records
